text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital and I are hashing out our plans for
the future, when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I'm fine! My head just hurts a little.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I've got the worst writer's block right now. Like, I can't decide what to do for my next fic at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You see, I happened across two Umamusume at
the infirmary earlier...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The older student carried the younger one in her
arms! And they were alone in the infirmary, just
the two of them—the younger one whimpering
weakly while the other one comforted her...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But as soon as I begin thinking of the many ways
that scene could develop I—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyah... owwwww! There it goes again, the second
I start daydreaming...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she's got headaches from... an overworked
imagination? I have no idea how that works, but
it ends up bothering her for the rest of the day.
